zh.lifeSummary: 當Biatryx Wentworth於1494年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾韋斯特 布頓時，她的父親Matthew Wentworth27歲，母親Elizabeth Woodruffe22歲。她於1509年5月25日與Sir Arthur Kaye在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾蒙德波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年在英國越可爾阿爾蒙德波利享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Biatryx Wentworth于1494年出生在英国英格兰越可爾韋斯特 布頓时，她的父亲Matthew Wentworth27岁，母亲Elizabeth Woodruffe22岁。她于1509年5月25日与Sir Arthur Kaye在英国英格兰越可爾阿爾蒙德波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年在英国越可爾阿爾蒙德波利享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Biatryx Wentworth was born in 1494, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Matthew Wentworth, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Woodruffe, was 22. She married Sir Arthur Kaye on 25 May 1509, in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1582, in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Biatryx Wentworth est née en 1494, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew Wentworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Woodruffe, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Arthur Kaye le 25 mai 1509, à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1582, à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, Yorkshire, E: West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Biatryx Wentworth 1494 in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew Wentworth 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Woodruffe 22. Sie hat am 25. Mai 1509 in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Arthur Kaye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1582 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Biatryx Wentworth è nata il nel 1494 nel West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Matthew Wentworth, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Woodruffe, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Arthur Kaye il 25 maggio 1509, nel Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1582, nel Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Biatryx Wentworthが1494年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンで生まれた時，父Matthew Wentworthは27歳，母Elizabeth Woodruffeは22歳であった。1509年5月25日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーでSir Arthur Kayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Biatryx Wentworth(이)가 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew Wentworth(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Woodruffe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1509년 5월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알몽버이에서 Sir Arthur Kaye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 영국 요르크실르 알몽버이에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알몽버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Biatryx Wentworth nasceu em 1494, em West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Matthew Wentworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Woodruffe, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Arthur Kaye em 25 de maio de 1509, em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1582, em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, Yorkshire, E: West Bretton, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Biatryx Wentworth родилась в 1494 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Matthew Wentworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Woodruffe, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Arthur Kaye 25 мая 1509 г. в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1582 г. в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Biatryx Wentworth nació en 1494, en West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Matthew Wentworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Woodruffe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Arthur Kaye el 25 de mayo de 1509, en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1582, en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
